name: pathways
description: Texas reentry navigator — composable Claude Code architecture: 7 progressive-disclosure Skills, 4 capability-scoped sub-agents, 3 deterministic safety hooks, and 2 domain-bounded MCP servers. Built as a safety-critical reference architecture.
author: Prathik Ravichandran <prathik.ravichandran.work@gmail.com>

servers.name: pathways-corpus
servers.description: BM25 retrieval over a curated corpus of TX statutory citations + NICCC collateral consequences. Returns confidence-scored results gated by the rag_confidence_gate hook.

servers.name: tx-resources
servers.description: Region-aware directory of Texas reentry organizations (legal aid, workforce, housing, benefits, ID). Each record carries phone, URL, eligibility, and verification date.
